sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَكْتَبَةُ الْقَدِيمَةُ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى كُتُبٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stara biblioteka sadržavala je mnogo knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient library contained many books.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطُّلَّابُ يَأْتُونَ مِنْ بِلَادٍ بَعِيدَةٍ لِيَقْرَأُوا فِيهَا.
sentences.translation: Studenti su dolazili iz dalekih zemalja da čitaju u njoj.
sentences.translationEn: Students came from distant lands to read in it.

sentences.translation: Knjige su bile pisane perom i tintom.
sentences.translationEn: The books were written with pens and ink.

sentences.arabic: حَافَظَ النَّاسُ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْكُتُبِ بِعِنَايَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su čuvali ove knjige s velikom pažnjom.
sentences.translationEn: The people preserved these books with great care.
